No mention of JAX-RS, @Produces, @Consumes, JaxRsMethodBinder, or REST API. Although the handler resides in nablarch.fw.web package, the content explicitly references Jakarta Server Pages (JSP) and Servlet API, which are web-application concepts, not REST-specific.
